title: Welcome to RC Showdown!
author: Roria Team
summaryHTML: Welcome to RC Showdown — the home of custom RC formats! Battle in RC OU, RC UU, RC Ubers, RC Doubles, and VGC. Hourly auto-tournaments run in the Lobby with Avalugg Token prizes for winners. Good luck!

title: Hourly Auto-Tournaments Now Live
author: Roria Team
summaryHTML: Automatic round-robin tournaments run every hour in the Lobby, rotating through RC OU, RC UU, RC Ubers, and RC VGC formats. Winners earn Avalugg Tokens! Use /avalugg to check your balance and /avalugg top for the leaderboard.
